title: The Tattooed Hitman
original_title: 山口組外伝　九州進攻作戦
overview: The most dangerous hired gun in Kyushu's underworld has managed to trigger a vicious gang war, and now, there's a contract on his life. Though nobody is more skilled in the arts of dealing death, can the tattooed hitman fend off the entire Japanese mafia as he searches for the man who wants him dead?

trailers.title: 「山口組外伝　九州進攻作戦」(公開年月日 1974年04月27日)　予告篇
